## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran `npm test -- --runInBand`
- [ ] I updated Swagger comments if an API contract changed
- [ ] I updated `.env.example` if config changed
- [ ] I documented mock versus live behaviour if shipping or payment logic changed
- [ ] I linked any relevant design, flow, or contract context for user-facing changes
- [ ] I noted any follow-up work or known gaps

## Testing

List the checks you ran and the result.

## Risk

Call out anything reviewers should watch closely, especially around auth, Stripe, Sendcloud, and order creation.
